title: Gaming with Friends 游戏开黑
scene: 两个朋友组队打游戏语音交流

lines.speaker: Player A
lines.line: Can you hear me? I am going to rush the left side. Cover me.
lines.trans: 能听到吗？我要从左边冲过去。掩护我。

lines.speaker: Player B
lines.line: Loud and clear. I will snipe from the rooftop. Watch out for the enemy behind the truck.
lines.trans: 很清楚。我会在屋顶狙击。小心卡车后面的敌人。

lines.speaker: Player A
lines.line: I see him. I will throw a smoke grenade. Get ready to shoot when he runs out.
lines.trans: 我看到他了。我要扔烟雾弹。他跑出来时准备射击。

lines.speaker: Player B
lines.line: Got it. Three, two, one... now! I hit him! Good teamwork.
lines.trans: 收到。三、二、一……现在！我打中了！配合真好。

lines.speaker: Player A
lines.line: Nice shot! Let us grab the supply box and heal up. My health is low.
lines.trans: 打得好！我们去拿补给箱，回复一下。我血量很低了。

lines.speaker: Player B
lines.line: There is a first-aid kit here. I will share it with you. Also pick up some ammo.
lines.trans: 这里有急救包。我分给你。再捡点弹药。

lines.speaker: Player A
lines.line: Thanks. The final circle is closing. We should move to the safe zone now.
lines.trans: 谢谢。决赛圈在收缩了。我们该进安全区了。

lines.speaker: Player B
lines.line: I see a car. Let us drive there. We have a good chance to win this match.
lines.trans: 我看到一辆车。我们开车过去。这局我们很有机会赢。

lines.speaker: Player A
lines.line: Let us do this. Victory belongs to us!
